title: Steam Web API keys should not be disclosed
description: Steam Web API keys provide access to Valve's Steam platform APIs for games, user profiles, game ownership, and achievements. Exposing API keys allows unauthorized access to player data and game-related information.
recommendation: Remove Steam API keys from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate at steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey.
impact: Unauthorized access to Steam user data, game libraries, achievement data, and player statistics.

checks.message: Steam Web API key detected in variable assignment. Steam Web API keys authenticate requests to access player profiles and game libraries, achievement data and statistics, player inventory and trading data, game server authentication, and Steam group information. Exposing this key allows unauthorized access to Steam user data and potential abuse of game server authentication. Rotate immediately at steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey.
